aljazeera.title: Iran war’s $37bn price tag: Why does the Pentagon want $67bn more?

monitor_the_situation.title: US Missile Strikes Hit Iranian Island Near Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Larak Island, Iran · 1h ago. American missile strikes target Larak Island, a strategic Iranian island overlooking the Strait of Hormuz, according to Iranian state media Tasnim.
US Forces Attack Kabudarahang County in Central Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Kabudarahang County, Iran · 11h ago. US forces attacked Kabudarahang County in central Iran, expanding the strike campaign to a new area.

US Launches 11th Night of Airstrikes on Iran, Including Tehran and Strait of Hormuz Areas, Expanding to New Provinces and Targeting Military Sites, Naval Capabilities, and Drone Storage to Degrade Thr
— S4 · Conflict · Bushehr, Iran · 14h ago. Multiple US airstrikes targeted the city of Bushehr in southern Iran. Casualties and damage not yet confirmed.
